name: Hollyland Wireless Tally System (8 Tally Lights)
description: This Wireless Tally System from Hollyland is a portable, complete tally solution that includes eight tally lights that can be connected up to 2600' away from the wireless host unit. Equipped with multiple ports that provide DB25, RJ45, and USB-C connectivity for compatibility with a wide range of switchers.

features.Key Features: Portable Wireless Tally System | 8 Tally Lights Included | Connect Tally Lights up to 2600' Away | Up to 16 Channels Supported | Smart Sequence Learning | Adaptive Frequency Hopping | Detachable Battery with 8-Hour Runtime | DB25, RJ45 & USB-C Connectivity | Tally Light & Battery Weigh Only 3.5 oz | Hard Shell Case Included
features.What’s In The Box: Hollyland Tally Station | DC Power Adapter with Power Cord | 2 x Wireless Tally System Antenna | USB-A to USB-C Cable | 8 x Hollyland Tally Light | Lithium-Ion Battery Pack 700 | Set of Number Stickers | Hollyland Hard-Shell Case for Wireless Tally System | Hollyland Antenna for Wireless Tally System (Pair) | Hollyland 12V 2A DC 2.1mm Power Adapter | 8-Slot Battery Charger
